zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Nicholas Gifford於1508年出生在英國巴金哈姆爾希勒斯登時，他的父親Roger Gifford45歲，母親Mary Nanseglos42歲。他於1526年與Lady Agnes Anne Masters在英國諾薩普頓史爾諾薩普頓結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他於1546年在英國諾薩普頓史爾諾薩普頓被列為bailliff。他去世於1546年5月19日在英國諾薩普頓史爾享年38歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Nicholas Gifford于1508年出生在英国巴金哈姆爾希勒斯登时，他的父亲Roger Gifford45岁，母亲Mary Nanseglos42岁。他于1526年与Lady Agnes Anne Masters在英国諾薩普頓史爾諾薩普頓结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他于1546年在英国諾薩普頓史爾諾薩普頓被列为bailliff。他去世于1546年5月19日在英国諾薩普頓史爾享年38岁。

nameMeanings.name: Gifford
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of Giffard, either from the Middle English personal name Gifard, derived from an Old French name of this form deriving from ancient Germanic geb- ‘give, gift’ + hard- ‘hardy, brave’, or perhaps sometimes a nickname from Old French gif(f)ard ‘chubby-cheeked, bloated’.

variants.name: Jeffords
meanings: English: variant of Gifford , with post-medieval excrescent -s. This surname is now rare in Britain.

nameMeanings.name: Nicholas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of the post-classical Greek personal name Nikolaos, derived from nikē ‘victory’ + laos ‘people’. The spelling with -ch- first occurred as early as the 12th century, and became firmly established at the time of the Reformation, although Nicolas is still occasionally found. St Nicholas was a 4th-century bishop of Myra in Lycia, about whom virtually nothing factual is known, although a vast body of legend grew up around him, and he became the patron saint of Greece and of Russia, as well as of children, sailors, merchants, and pawnbrokers. His feast day is 6 December , and among the many roles which legend has assigned to him is that of bringer of Christmas presents, in the guise of ‘Santa Claus’ (an alteration of the Dutch form of his name, Sinterklaas).

variants.name: Nickolas
meanings: Mainly U.S.: variant spelling of   Nicholas  , influenced by the short form   Nick .

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Nicholas Gifford was born in 1508, in Hillesden, Buckinghamshire, England, his father, Roger Gifford, was 45 and his mother, Mary Nanseglos, was 42. He married Lady Agnes Anne Masters in 1526, in Northampton, Northamptonshire, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 4 daughters. In 1546, at the age of 38, his occupation is listed as bailliff in Northampton, Northamptonshire, England. He died on 19 May 1546, in Northamptonshire, England, at the age of 38.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Nicholas Gifford est né en 1508, à Hillesden, Buckinghamshire, Angleterre, son père, Roger Gifford, avait 45 ans et sa mère, Mary Nanseglos, avait 42 ans. Il a épousé Lady Agnes Anne Masters en 1526, à Northampton, Northamptonshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 4 filles. En 1546, à l’âge de 38 ans, sa profession de son indiquée est bailliff à Northampton, Northamptonshire, Angleterre. Il est décédé le 19 mai 1546, à Northamptonshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 38 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Nicholas Gifford 1508 in Hillesden, Buckinghamshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Roger Gifford 45 und seine Mutter Mary Nanseglos 42. Er hat 1526 in Northampton, Northamptonshire, England Lady Agnes Anne Masters geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 4 Töchter. 1546, als er 38 Jahre alt war, war sein Beruf als bailliff in Northampton, Northamptonshire, England aufgeführt. Er starb am 19. Mai 1546 im Alter von 38 Jahren in Northamptonshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Nicholas Gifford è nato il nel 1508 nel Hillesden, Buckinghamshire, England, il suo padre, Roger Gifford, aveva 45 anni e il suo madre, Mary Nanseglos, aveva 42 anni. Lui sposato Lady Agnes Anne Masters nel 1526, nel Northampton, Northamptonshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 4 figlie. Nel 1546, all'età di 38 anni, la sua occupazione è indicata come bailliff nel Northampton, Northamptonshire, England. Morì il 19 maggio 1546, nel Northamptonshire, England, all'età di 38 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Nicholas Giffordが1508年にイギリスブクインガムシュアイアヒレスデンで生まれた時，父Roger Giffordは45歳，母Mary Nanseglosは42歳であった。1526年にイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアノーサンプトンでLady Agnes Anne Mastersと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。1546年，38歳の時，イギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアノーサンプトンでの職業はbailliffと記録されている。彼は1546年5月19日にイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアで38歳で死去した。

ko.St James' Church, Thurning, Northamptons: 영국 노르섬프토실르 스른잉 스트 자메스' c후르치
ko.lifeSummary: Sir Nicholas Gifford(이)가 1508년 영국 벅잉함실르 힐레즈든에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Roger Gifford(은)는 45세였고, 그의 어머니 Mary Nanseglos(은)는 42세였다. 그는 1526년 영국 노르섬프토실르 노르섬프턴에서 Lady Agnes Anne Masters(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 1546년, 38세의 나이로 그의 직업은 영국 노르섬프토실르 노르섬프턴에서 bailliff이었다. 그는 1546년 5월 19일 영국 노르섬프토실르에서 38세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Nicholas Gifford nasceu em 1508, em Hillesden, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Roger Gifford, tinha 45 anos e sua mãe, Mary Nanseglos, tinha 42 anos. Ele casou-se com Lady Agnes Anne Masters em 1526, em Northampton, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 4 filhas. Em 1546, com 38 anos, sua profissão aparece como bailliff em Northampton, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra. Ele faleceu em 19 de maio de 1546, em Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, com 38 anos.

ru.St James' Church, Thurning, Northamptons: ст джемес' чурч, турнинг, нортамптоншир, Англия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Nicholas Gifford родился в 1508 г. в местности хиллесден, буккингхамшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Roger Gifford было 45 лет, а матери, которую звали Mary Nanseglos, 42. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Agnes Anne Masters в 1526 г. в местности нортамптон, нортамптоншир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 4 дочери. В 1546 году, в возрасте 38 лет,  он работал по профессии bailliff в местности нортамптон, нортамптоншир, Англия. Он умер 19 мая 1546 г. в местности нортамптоншир, Англия в возрасте 38 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Nicholas Gifford nació en 1508, en Hillesden, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Roger Gifford, tenía 45 años y su mamá, Mary Nanseglos, tenía 42 años. Se casó con Lady Agnes Anne Masters en 1526, en Northampton, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 4 hijas. En 1546, a la edad de 38 años, su ocupación registrada era bailliff en Northampton, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra. Murió el 19 de mayo de 1546, en Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 38 años.
